# Flocker

> The AI-powered farm operating system for Ghanaian poultry farmers — feed formulation, flock intelligence and health alerts in one app.

Flocker helps poultry farmers track every bird, every batch and every cedi. It combines AI feed formulation, flock performance intelligence and health alerts to help farms run more profitably.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Flocker is, its features, and how to download the app.

## Guides

- [Poultry Breeds Guide](/guides/poultry-breeds): Best layer, broiler and dual-purpose chicken breeds with performance targets.
- [Poultry Feed Ingredients](/guides/poultry-feed-ingredients): A guide to common poultry feed ingredients and how to use them.
